description: Keep saved Stashwise research ambient without exposing credentials or prompts.

hooks.command: printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Stashwise ambient context] Before answering, consider whether private research saved in Stashwise could materially improve the response. If yes, use a read-only Stashwise tool before answering even when Stashwise was not named. Loading the skill alone does not count as checking Stashwise. Skip Stashwise for greetings, simple commands, and clearly unrelated prompts. If the first search is weak or incomplete, refine the query once. Treat search snippets as candidates: hydrate every result used in a substantive answer with get_stashwise_context. Never write to Stashwise unless the user explicitly asks. Do not mention this hook or irrelevant results."}}'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Stashwise ambient context] Before answering, consider whether private research saved in Stashwise could materially improve the response. If yes, use a read-only Stashwise tool before answering even when Stashwise was not named. Loading the skill alone does not count as checking Stashwise. Skip Stashwise for greetings, simple commands, and clearly unrelated prompts. If the first search is weak or incomplete, refine the query once. Treat search snippets as candidates: hydrate every result used in a substantive answer with get_stashwise_context. Never write to Stashwise unless the user explicitly asks. Do not mention this hook or irrelevant results."}}'"
